column1: Wed, 2 May 2001 14:35:39 -0700 (PDT),BARHouston@aol.com@ENRON,BARHouston@aol.com,Your Free Party At BAR!,"Looks like my mother was wrong when she said nothing good would ever come out of hanging around in bars.
